name: Iso11783IL_SetMsgRawData
title: Iso11783IL_SetMsgRawData
syntax: long Iso11783IL_SetMsgRawData( dbMsg msg, long dataSize, byte data[] );
long Iso11783IL_SetMsgRawData( dbMsg msg, long dataSize, char data[] );
long Iso11783IL_SetMsgRawData( dbMsg msg, pg * pgData );
description: Sets the data bytes of the message. The length of the parameter group is adjusted to size of parameter dataSize.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: message name from database, must be assigned to the node as Tx message

parameters.name: pgData
parameters.description: data and DLC are taken from this parameter group

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
